languages.text: {n}Пока корабль шел через {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}варп{/g}, офицеры под вашим началом разработали несколько тактических планов, наиболее отвечающих предстоящей миссии. Теперь вам предстоит принять решение — сосредоточить огонь на вражеском крейсере, или вначале избавиться от его свиты.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Пока корабли шли через {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}варп{/g}, командиры флота под вашим началом разработали несколько тактических планов, наиболее отвечающих предстоящей миссии. Первый из них подразумевал быстрое уничтожение ядра ударных сил врага с прорывом в глубокий тыл. Второй — глухую оборону, в которой завязнут все многочисленные истребители противника.{/n}

languages.text: {n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пока корабль шел через {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}варп{/g}, офицеры под вашим началом разработали несколько тактических планов, наиболее отвечающих предстоящей миссии. Теперь вам предстоит принять решение — сосредоточить огонь на вражеском крейсере, или вначале избавиться от его свиты.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}

{n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}

{n}As the ships passed through warp, the fleet commanders under your leadership developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. The first of them involves the rapid obliteration of the enemy's core strike force with a push deep behind the enemy's lines. The second is a full-scale defence that will tie up all of the enemy's numerous fighters.{/n}

{n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}

{n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ワープ航行中に、あなたの指揮の下、艦隊司令官たちは任務に最適な戦術をいくつか考案しました。その一つは、敵陣深くまで突き込み、敵の主力部隊を迅速に殲滅するというものです。もう一つは、敵の多数の戦闘機を全力を挙げて迎え撃つというものです。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the ships passed through warp, the fleet commanders under your leadership developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. The first of them involves the rapid obliteration of the enemy's core strike force with a push deep behind the enemy's lines. The second is a full-scale defence that will tie up all of the enemy's numerous fighters.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ワープ航行中に、あなたの指揮の下、艦隊司令官たちは任務に最適な戦術をいくつか考案しました。その一つは、敵陣深くまで突き込み、敵の主力部隊を迅速に殲滅するというものです。もう一つは、敵の多数の戦闘機を全力を挙げて迎え撃つというものです。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mientras la nave atravesaba la {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}disformidad{/g}, tus oficiales han preparado varios planes tácticos para la misión que os espera. Te corresponde tomar una decisión entre concentrar los ataques en el crucero enemigo o empezar eliminando sus escoltas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mientras la nave atravesaba la {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}disformidad{/g}, tus oficiales han preparado varios planes tácticos para la misión que os espera. Te corresponde tomar una decisión entre concentrar los ataques en el crucero enemigo o empezar eliminando sus escoltas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在穿越{g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}亚空间{/g}的航程中，你的军官们拟定了数套最适合当前任务的战术方案。现在，一个抉择摆在你面前：是集中火力攻击敌方巡洋舰，还是先清除它的护航编队。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在穿越{g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}亚空间{/g}的航程中，你的军官们拟定了数套最适合当前任务的战术方案。现在，一个抉择摆在你面前：是集中火力攻击敌方巡洋舰，还是先清除它的护航编队。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Während das Schiff durch den {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}Warp{/g} flog, haben deine Offiziere taktische Pläne für die anstehende Mission entwickelt. Nun musst du dich entscheiden: Bündelst du das Feuer auf den feindlichen Kreuzer oder schaltest du zuerst seine Eskorte aus?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Während das Schiff durch den {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}Warp{/g} flog, haben deine Offiziere taktische Pläne für die anstehende Mission entwickelt. Nun musst du dich entscheiden: Bündelst du das Feuer auf den feindlichen Kreuzer oder schaltest du zuerst seine Eskorte aus?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gemi {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}öteboyuttan{/g} geçerken subayların, eldeki göreve uygun birkaç taktik plan geliştiriyor. Bir seçim yapman gerekiyor: Ateşi düşman kruvazörüne yoğunlaştırmak ya da önce refakatçisini ortadan kaldırmak.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Gemi {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}öteboyuttan{/g} geçerken subayların, eldeki göreve uygun birkaç taktik plan geliştiriyor. Bir seçim yapman gerekiyor: Ateşi düşman kruvazörüne yoğunlaştırmak ya da önce refakatçisini ortadan kaldırmak.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pendant que les vaisseaux traversaient le {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}Warp{/g}, vos officiers ont élaboré plusieurs stratégies adaptées à la mission qui vous attend. Il ne vous reste plus qu'à décider si vous préférez concentrer votre feu sur le croiseur ennemi ou commencer par éliminer son escorte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}
